data.title: onboarding: non-technical user receives dso:architect-foundation without --auto flag suggestion -> harder setup experience
data.description:
## Incident Overview
/dso:onboarding does not suggest the '--auto' flag when recommending /dso:architect-foundation to non-technical users. The --auto flag uses sensible defaults for all architecture decisions, making the process much easier for non-technical users who don't understand the choices.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: When /dso:onboarding detects a non-technical user and recommends /dso:architect-foundation, it should suggest '/dso:architect-foundation --auto' rather than the bare command, explaining that --auto applies sensible defaults without requiring architectural knowledge.
- **Observed**: /dso:onboarding suggests '/dso:architect-foundation' without the --auto flag, leaving non-technical users to navigate complex architectural choices.

## Affected Component
plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — /dso:architect-foundation handoff recommendation

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session.
